hooks.command: python -c "from noethersolve.hooks import pre_tool_use; pre_tool_use('$TOOL_NAME')" 2>/dev/null || true
python -c "from noethersolve.hooks import post_tool_use; post_tool_use('$TOOL_NAME', '$TOOL_RESULT')" 2>/dev/null || true
python -c "from noethersolve.hooks import session_end; session_end()" 2>/dev/null || true
